heading: Utilities: proceeds from overseas operations
label: 7591 Utilities: proceeds from overseas operations
text: During actual or threatened hostilities, proceeds from operating a public utility in connection with operations of the Corps of Engineers in the field overseas are available for that utility until the close of the fiscal year following that in which they are received.
